title: Hitbox For My Light Block!
description: Show hitbox for the Light Block even when not holding the Light Block item!
body:
# Hitbox for my Light Block!
This is a simple mod that will make [Light Block](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Light_(block)) in Minecraft show its hitbox in Creative Mode, even without holding the item.

Please see [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/hitbox-for-my-light-block/gallery) for screenshots.

This makes it useful when e.g. performing worldedit with the default wooden axe, where the light block would normally not be selectable.

## Configuring
You can install [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) to toggle the functionality of this mod. (i.e. To always show hitbox in creative or follow vanilla behavior)

## Credits
Volpeon for the [Blobfox emoji](https://volpeon.ink/emojis/blobfox/) used in the icon!
